inputs.label: Service id to use for the "Demonstrate a Hook Response" test

                the tests will be skipped.

Provide a single JSON request body to submit for the hook invocation. The type of hook invoked
                will be inferred based on the `hook` element in the request.

CDS Hooks recommends ES384 and RS384 for JWT signature verification.
Select which method to use.

inputs.name: jwks_kid
inputs.label: CDS Services JWKS kid
inputs.description:
The key ID of the JWKS private key to use for signing the JWTs when invoking a CDS service endpoint
requiring authentication.
Defaults to the first JWK in the list if no kid is supplied.

inputs.name: appointment_book_service_ids
inputs.label: Service id for the service that implements the `appointment-book` hook
inputs.description:
If blank, Inferno will attempt to infer the service id to use by finding a service entry in the
            Discovery response for the target hook. If it cannot be inferred, the tests will be skipped.

inputs.name: encryption_method
inputs.label: JWT Signing Algorithm
inputs.description:
CDS Hooks recommends ES384 and RS384 for JWT signature verification.
Select which method to use.

inputs.name: jwks_kid
inputs.label: CDS Services JWKS kid
inputs.description:
The key ID of the JWKS private key to use for signing the JWTs when invoking a CDS service endpoint
requiring authentication.
Defaults to the first JWK in the list if no kid is supplied.

inputs.name: encounter_start_service_ids
inputs.label: Service id for the service that implements the `encounter-start` hook
inputs.description:
If blank, Inferno will attempt to infer the service id to use by finding a service entry in the
            Discovery response for the target hook. If it cannot be inferred, the tests will be skipped.

inputs.label: Request body or bodies for invoking the `encounter-start` hook
inputs.description: To send multiple requests, provide as a JSON list, e.g., [json_body_1, json_body_2].

Select which method to use.

inputs.name: jwks_kid

inputs.description:
The key ID of the JWKS private key to use for signing the JWTs when invoking a CDS service endpoint
requiring authentication.
Defaults to the first JWK in the list if no kid is supplied.

            Discovery response for the target hook. If it cannot be inferred, the tests will be skipped.

inputs.name: encryption_method
inputs.label: JWT Signing Algorithm
inputs.description:
CDS Hooks recommends ES384 and RS384 for JWT signature verification.
Select which method to use.

inputs.name: jwks_kid
inputs.label: CDS Services JWKS kid
inputs.description:
The key ID of the JWKS private key to use for signing the JWTs when invoking a CDS service endpoint
requiring authentication.
Defaults to the first JWK in the list if no kid is supplied.

inputs.name: order_sign_service_ids
inputs.label: Service id for the service that implements the `order-sign` hook
inputs.description:
If blank, Inferno will attempt to infer the service id to use by finding a service entry in the
            Discovery response for the target hook. If it cannot be inferred, the tests will be skipped.

inputs.name: order_sign_request_bodies
inputs.label: Request body or bodies for invoking the `order-sign` hook
inputs.description: To send multiple requests, provide as a JSON list, e.g., [json_body_1, json_body_2].
